A customer purchased two types of edible glitter to decorate a cake. The first glitter, which is the subject of the majority of the reviews, was described as having "tonnes of sparkle" and making a "statement." The other glitter went on grey and was not appetizing. The customer highly recommended this glitter and praised the fast delivery. Another customer also loved the product and needed every color available. However, another customer warned that the glitter was not edible as advertised and tasted like craft glitter. They recommended sticking with Wilton products for trustworthy edible glitter. Another customer used the glitter to decorate a disco ball birthday cake, and their customer loved it.

A customer purchased Twizzlers licorice for their office due to its bite-sized pieces, making it easier for people to grab a few pieces instead of an entire licorice stick. They received multiple bags, but one of them broke open during shipping. The customer prefers Twizzlers over another well-known brand and appreciates the savings when buying in bulk with free shipping. The black and cherry flavors were praised for their good taste, while the strawberry flavor was criticized for being too delicate and barely there. Another customer shared their love for Twizzlers, stating they are addicted and use Subscribe & Save to buy in packs of six bags, resulting in significant savings. They also mentioned the convenience of having less messy licorice for children. Another reviewer noted that the pieces in the bag might have been reduced in size.
